us_markets.note: Overnight — Monday May 18 close. Oil eased on Iran-Hormuz optimism. Trump says postponed Iran attack. 10Y yield remains elevated. Nvidia earnings Wednesday is focus.

sp500.note: Session close. Modest rally from Friday selloff. Pre-market futures flat.

dow.note: Rising yields pressure. Futures recovered slightly from -350 pts overnight.

nasdaq.note: Tech mixed. Nvidia Wed earnings key. Meta layoffs underway.

10y_treasury_yield.note: Remains near 1-year high. Bond rout eased slightly overnight.

wti_crude.note: Overnight futures slipped from $105 highs. US eases Russian oil sanctions to contain Iran price surge. Trump postpones Iran attack.

brent_crude.note: Brent eased alongside WTI. Geopolitical risk premium still baked in.

gold.note: Overnight recovery to ~$4,568 from low of $4,483. Safe-haven bid intact.

usd_cny.note: CNY stable despite global risk-off and A-share opening.

us_markets.key_story: Overnight: Trump says he postponed 'scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow' at Mideast leaders' request — de-escalation catalyst sent oil sliding from highs. US also easing Russian oil sanctions to contain price surge. Japan Q1 GDP beat at 2.1% annualized. Global bond rout shows signs of stabilizing. Nvidia earnings Wednesday remains the week's defining event. NextEra-Dominion $67B utility megamerger reshaping AI power landscape. A-shares open lower tracking global caution.
overnight_headlines: Trump postpones scheduled attack of Iran — oil slides
US to ease Russian oil sanctions to cap Iran-triggered price surge
Japan Q1 GDP annualized +2.1%, beats expectations
Nvidia earnings Wednesday — AI thesis test
NextEra-Dominion $67B utility mega-merger for AI data centers

asia_markets.note: Tuesday May 19 — pre-market / early open. A-shares tracking lower. SH Comp closed 4131 on Monday.

shanghai_composite.note: Opened lower. Monday close 4131.5. Risk-off tone persists.

hsi.note: Pre-market. Monday close at 25611. Financials weak, oil stocks gain.

nikkei.note: Japan GDP beat (+2.1% annualized) may support. Market opening mixed.

shanghai_monday_close.note: Shanghai Composite Monday May 18 close (actual data)

crypto.note: Crypto remains in risk-off territory. BTC below $78K. ETH below $2,150. Fear & Greed at Extreme Fear (22).

news_highlights.title: Trump says he's postponing 'scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow' at Middle East leaders' request
US eases Russian oil sanctions in bid to contain Iran price surge
Japan's economy grows at annualized 2.1% rate in Q1, beating expectations
Citi strikes €15bn partnership with BlackRock for private European lending
Nvidia earnings Wednesday — most important AI earnings of the quarter
NextEra Energy to buy Dominion for $67 billion — unites two key players in race to power AI data centers
Meta layoffs starting this week underscore Zuckerberg's AI reality
Musk slams Altman trial verdict as 'technicality,' vows to appeal
China's firms face barrage of EU probes — a glaring weakness exposed
UK plans to relax key banking rules set up after 2008 financial crisis

gold.trend: Recovering from intraday low of $4,483. Safe-haven bid intact. Overnight +0.8%.

wti_crude.trend: Slipped from $105 highs after Trump postpones Iran attack and US eases Russian oil sanctions.

brent_crude.trend: Eased alongside WTI. Iran de-escalation narrative.

geopolitical_risk.note: Elevated but with de-escalation signals overnight
